data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and offers, none of them directly address the behavior of tier transitions or the associated financial implications. This indicates a lack of concrete evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
